---
title: "`omni-scrna` monitor"
format:
  html:
    df-print: kable   # or "paged", "gt", "table"
editor: source
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
ORG <- "omni-scrna"
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(dplyr)
library(gh)

.token <- Sys.getenv("GITHUB_TOKEN")
nchar(.token)

repos <- gh(paste0("/orgs/", ORG, "/repos"),
            .token = .token,
            .limit = 1000)
repos <- sapply(repos, .subset2, "html_url")

# data.frame(repos = repos)
```

## Quick summary: `r ORG`

In this [`r ORG`](`r dirname(repos)[1]`) organization, you have [`r length(repos)` repositories](`r paste0("https://github.com/orgs/", ORG, "/repositories")`). 

## List of open PRs: `r ORG`


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# getting list of open PRs
open_prs <- c()
for(i in 1:length(repos)) {
  prs <- gh("GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls",
            owner = "omni-scrna", 
            repo = basename(repos[i]),
            state = "open", per_page = 100,
            .token = .token)
  open_prs <- c(open_prs, prs)
}

parse_pr_info <- function(u) {
  time_utc <- as.POSIXct(u$updated_at, 
                         format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", 
                         tz = "UTC")

  data.frame(repo = paste0("[", basename(u$base$repo$url), "](",
                           u$base$repo$svn_url, ")"),
             sender = u$user$login,
             title = u$title,
             pr = paste0("[", basename(u$html_url), "](", u$html_url, ")",
                         ifelse(u$draft, " [DRAFT]","")),
             last_update = format(time_utc, "%d.%m.%Y (%H:%M)", 
                                  tz = "Europe/Zurich"))
}

prs_df <- lapply(open_prs, parse_pr_info) %>% 
  bind_rows() %>%
  arrange(last_update)
prs_df
```
